description: A customer at checkout realizes they forgot an item and needs to leave the line to get it. The associate needs to suspend the transaction to help the next customer.

expected_outcome.value: The items are added to the transaction.

nodes.task_description: Use the 'Suspend Transaction' function on the POS.

expected_outcome.value: The current transaction is saved, and the POS is ready for a new sale. A slip with a barcode is printed to resume the transaction.

nodes.task_description: When the customer returns, scan the barcode on the slip to resume the transaction, add the final item, and complete the sale.

expected_outcome.value: The saved transaction is successfully retrieved and completed.
